lore_context:
shadow, image 
less common:
reflection, presence, silhouette, sign
Manual Translation::1.deepl_suggestion:
The dragon power of the evil dragon that flowed for a time in Acker Sheran--
Whenever a lingering shadow appeared, you repeatedly came out to slay it.
I will never forget the debt of gratitude I owe you, not even for a moment.

Manual Translation::2.deepl_suggestion:
I faintly feel the power of the Emblemstone.
The power of what was originally meant to be given
You may take it as your own

Manual Translation::3.deepl_suggestion:
I faintly feel the power of the Emblemstone.
The power of what was originally meant to be given
You may take it as your own
